summary: Ran ruff lint check on suite-core/ and generated comprehensive report. Found 95 errors across 6 categories: 55 unused imports (F401), 15 module-import-not-at-top (E402), 9 f-string-missing-placeholders (F541), 7 unused variables (F841), 5 type comparisons (E721), and 4 multiple-statements-on-one-line (E701). Identified top issue file as suite-core/api/app.py with 8 errors. 60 issues are auto-fixable with --fix flag (63%); 35 require manual review (37%).
issues: suite-core/api/app.py contains 8 E402 errors due to imports appearing after module-level code (lines 85-98). This appears to be intentional architecture for conditional middleware setup.
No code modifications made per task requirement (report-only mode).
